# AI Visibility Audit by Calibre Studio

> A free tool that scores any website on how AI engines read, understand, trust, and recommend it. Built on the DCAT method: Discoverability, Clarity, Authority, Trust.

## What it does
- Reads your public homepage and site-root signals (structured data, headings, meta, llms.txt, sitemap, robots).
- Scores Discoverability and Clarity from the structural signals it can see.
- Gives a provisional read on Authority and Trust, confirmed in the full paid audit.
- Returns plain-language findings and a dated 90-day plan.

## Use it
- Run the free audit: https://indexed.calibrestudio.co/
- Calibre Studio: https://www.calibrestudio.co/
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/calibrestudio

## About
Built by Calibre Studio, a creative and AI studio between the Gold Coast and Paris. The audit measures the signals ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, and Copilot read before they recommend a business.
